title: Low Durability Warning
description: Never be surprised by broken tools again! This mod provides customizable alerts when your equipment durability reaches critical levels.
body:
![#Low Durability Warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01c5ae26ddbc4955293f5a4dd0ca7e0af46aa81c.png)

![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.11-green)
![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modloader-Fabric-blue)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow)

Never be surprised by broken tools again! This mod provides customizable alerts when your equipment durability reaches critical levels.

## ✨ Features

### ⚠️ Multi-Level Warnings
- **First Warning** - Yellow alert at customizable threshold
- **Second Warning** - Orange alert as durability decreases
- **Critical Warning** - Red alert when near breaking

### 🎯 Item Coverage
- **Tools & Weapons** - Main hand items
- **Armor** - All armor slots (helmet, chestplate, leggings, boots)
- **Elytra** - Separate toggle for wing durability
- **Enchanted Only** - Option to alert only for enchanted items

### 🔊 Smart Alerts
- **Colored Messages** - Visual cues with Minecraft color codes
- **Bell Sounds** - Audible alerts with adjustable pitch
- **Cooldown System** - Prevents alert spam
- **Custom Text** - Personalize alert messages

## 🚀 Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Download [Low Durability Warning](https://modrinth.com/mod/low-durability-warning/versions)
4. Place the JAR file in your `.minecraft/mods/` folder

## ⚙️ Configuration

Access all settings in-game via **ModMenu**:
1. Open ModMenu interface
2. Click on "Low Durability Warning"
3. Configure warning thresholds, sounds, and item types
4. Changes apply instantly

## 🔧 Technical Details

- **Client-side only** - Works without server installation
- **Requirements**:
    - Fabric Loader 0.18.4+
    - Fabric API
- **Optional**: ModMenu for in-game configuration

## 🤝 Compatibility

- Compatible with most inventory/HUD mods
- Works alongside other durability-related mods
- No conflicts with resource packs

## 🐛 Reporting Issues

Found a bug or have a feature request?
[Open an issue](https://github.com/Astralis-B/low-durability-warning/issues)

Please include:
- Minecraft version
- Mod version
- Other installed mods
- Steps to reproduce the issue

## 🙏 Credits

- **Astralis** - Development
- **FabricMC** - Modloader foundation
- **Cloth Config** - Configuration system
- **ModMenu** - In-game settings interface

*"Because a broken pickaxe mid-mining is the real final boss."*
